response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with direct overlap on the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators, which matches the role's AI agent requirement. Strong engineering craft signals (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and architecture exposure across web, backend, and embedded systems support the seniority bar.
strengths: Primary stack match with TypeScript/Node.js/React across multiple senior roles
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience directly aligned with the role
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source ownership
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Limited Kotlin/Java exposure for the secondary backend stack
No clear evidence of PostgreSQL at scale; MongoDB is the main DB mentioned
